examples: Nothing happened; there seemed to be no angels or fairies interested in this luckless captive.
It's luckless, I lost my bicycle in the morning and my wallet was stolen in the afternoon!
At first a young boy, Manolin, had Shared his bad fortune, but after the fortieth luckless day the boy's father told his son to go in another boat.
The luckless Murray, 27, has recovered from a cruciate knee ligament injury suffered in pre-season training.
Motherwell came racing out of the traps and took an early lead courtesy of the luckless Severin.
